---
title: "Activity 07: K-means analysis"
author: "Navarroza"
date: "June 8"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
# 1 
setwd("C:/Users/Admin/downloads")
morph_data <- read.csv("morphology_data.csv")

# 2 
morph_clean <- morph_data[, !(names(morph_data) %in% "sex")]
morph_clean <- morph_clean[, -c(1:2)]
morph_clean <- na.omit(morph_clean)

# 3
morph_scaled <- scale(morph_clean)
set.seed(123) 
km_3 <- kmeans(morph_scaled, centers = 3, nstart = 25)
print(km_3)

# 4
plot(morph_clean$SVL, morph_clean$TailLength, 
     col = km_3$cluster, 
     pch = 19, 
     xlab = "SVL", 
     ylab = "Tail Length", 
     main = "K-means Clustering of Philippine Green Crested Lizards")
wss <- numeric(9)
for (k in 2:10) {
  km_loop <- kmeans(morph_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)
  wss[k-1] <- km_loop$tot.withinss
}

plot(2:10, wss, type = "b", pch = 19, frame = FALSE, 
     xlab = "Number of clusters K", ylab = "Total Within-clusters SS")
```
